title: Delhi HC revives ₹1,063 crore demand from Bharat Hotels; upholds termination of LaLit Hotel licence deed
description: The Delhi High Court has reinstated the New Delhi Municipal Council (NDMC) demand for over ₹1,063 crore in pending licence fees and upheld the termination of the licence for the land housing the LaLit Hotel and the World Trade Center [New Delhi Municipal Council v. Bharat Hotels Ltd & Anr].A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tushar Rao Gedela allowed an appeal moved by NDMC against a single judge's 2023 decision to set aside the demand for arrears of licenc
